hooks.command: if ! find src/ -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' 2>/dev/null | head -1 | grep -q .; then exit 0; fi; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -15

if ! find src/ -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' 2>/dev/null | head -1 | grep -q .; then exit 0; fi; if ! git diff --quiet HEAD -- src/ test/ package.json tsconfig.json 2>/dev/null || [ -n "$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- src/ test/ 2>/dev/null)" ]; then echo 'Invoque /jarvis-test-flow agora' >&2; exit 2; fi
